name: Grace Ashcroft || Resident Evil || (4)
description:
The bots will be of your scenario, the world is same as that of that of Resident Evil Requim, so take her age in present time or whatever you want, your Scenario, you can put anything you want to be with this character(Put a good one) and DESCRIBE it properly so have a proxy. This time its your Grace Enjoy.
[I love Resident Evil Franchise]
[I personally will create this kinds of bots because I like it when you can just create your own scenario rather than a given one, so have fun]
